$comment: Documents what src/app/globals.css actually implements — one source of truth. Do not fork these values elsewhere; edit globals.css and this file together.

app.$comment: In-app exam experience — off limits to marketing-surface work.

royal-orange-tint.note: Exact required wordmark orange for 'Mosaic'. Passes WCAG AA large/bold text on dark/royal backgrounds only (~3.6:1 on royal-purple, ~5.6:1 on brand-ink) — fails even large-text 3:1 on white/paper (~2.7-2.9:1). Used directly for the inverse (dark-bg) wordmark; light-bg wordmark keeps --warning instead (see BRAND.md). Shared by MindMosaicLogo and LandingLogo. Deliberately NOT merged with --royal-orange, which stays a separate fill/icon colour — see BRAND.md.

landing.$comment: Marketing surface (src/features/landing) — additive to the app tokens above, never a fork of them.

brand.use: Primary buttons, heading accents, active states

accent.use: Badges, highlight tiles, progress emphasis — never body text

accent-strong.use: Red text small enough to need 4.5:1

typography.$comment: Loaded via next/font in src/app/page.tsx; resolve through --font-display / --font-body outside "/" fall back to the system stack.
